name: Effnetplattformen AB (publ)
summary: Effnetplattformen AB (publ), through its subsidiary, Effnet AB, provides header compression products. The company develops and sells the Effnet Header Compression products, which consists of software applications that increase the productivity of Internet Protocol traffic in fixed, mobile, and satellite networks. Its customers include chipset companies, and manufacturers of satellite and telecommunications equipment. The company is based in Lule√É¬•, Sweden.
